name: Quick Lemon-Beef Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Beef flank steak, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok or skillet.
2. Add 2 tablespoons vegetable oil.
3. Add thinly sliced beef and sauté until half cooked.
4. Combine soy sauce, hoisin sauce, garlic, sugar, chili flakes, lemon juice, cornstarch, and lemon zest into a sauce.
5. Add the sauce to the beef in the wok and stir well.
6. Cook for about 1 minute until glossy.
7. Add salt and white pepper to taste.
8. Stir in carrots and mushrooms.
9. Continue cooking until mushrooms and snow peas are cooked but still crunchy.
10. Serve immediately with plain rice.
